scent.aromaaffect.winter.description: Breathing in cold air, soft snowstorm, notes of cool mint, ozone, and watery melon
scent.aromaaffect.barnyard.description: Warm hay, farm animals, hint of fresh country air
scent.aromaaffect.sweet.description: Freshly baked treat with notes of vanilla, cream, and chocolate
scent.aromaaffect.floral.description: Wandering through a flower garden, catching wafts of different blooms
scent.aromaaffect.beach.description: Relaxing in the sand with hints of sunscreen and coconut
scent.aromaaffect.kindred.description: The warmth of human connection with gentle notes of baby powder and soothing lavender
scent.aromaaffect.petrichor.description: Grey skies before a storm, rain hitting pavement, scent of drenched streets
scent.aromaaffect.marine.description: Ocean spray and seaweed tangled in coastal vegetation with weathered driftwood
scent.aromaaffect.evergreen.description: Exploring deep forests with notes of pine trees and lush greenery
scent.aromaaffect.terra_silva.descriptio: Fresh dirt, earthy minerals, wet moss, cold deep forest rivers with hints of plants
scent.aromaaffect.citrus.description: Fresh citrus from a tree - bright, ripe, zesty with lemon, orange, and grapefruit
scent.aromaaffect.desert.description: Dry, herbal, desert heat and sand
scent.aromaaffect.savory_spice.descripti: A medley of spices for savory dishes - coriander, ginger, black pepper, paprika
scent.aromaaffect.timber.description: Dried wood, entering a lumber yard with notes of sandalwood and cedarwood
scent.aromaaffect.smoky.description: The crackling of a campfire with creosote and cedarwood
scent.aromaaffect.machina.description: Diesel fuel, industrial parts of cities, slightly sulfurous
